objectives.title: Improve Patient Safety
objectives.description: This objective aims to enhance the safety of patients by reducing hospital-acquired infections and serious clinical incidents. A zero-tolerance approach to preventable harm will be adopted, requiring a cultural shift towards proactive risk management.

objectives.title: Modernise Hospital Technology
objectives.description: The goal is to transform the hospital into a digitally mature organization by upgrading IT infrastructure and implementing a cloud-hosted Electronic Health Record system. This modernization will streamline operations, enhance data security, and improve clinical decision-making.

objectives.title: Enhance Patient Experience and Satisfaction
objectives.description: This objective focuses on placing patients at the center of service delivery by improving communication, reducing waiting times, and enhancing overall care experiences. The aim is to significantly increase patient satisfaction and loyalty.

objectives.title: Develop and Retain a Skilled Workforce
objectives.description: The objective is to ensure that the hospital has a skilled and motivated workforce by investing in training and development programs. This will help address workforce shortages and improve the quality of care provided to patients.

objectives.title: Achieve Financial Sustainability
objectives.description: This objective aims to ensure the long-term financial health of the hospital by implementing strategies to reduce deficits and improve resource allocation. Achieving financial sustainability is crucial for maintaining high-quality healthcare services.
